audit_items.proof_trace: Every dereference of pi_ (the sole raw pointer in this file) is guarded with an explicit null check (if(pi_ != 0), ternary pi_ != 0?, or short-circuit &&/|| evaluation) before use. Allocating constructors use operator new (throws bad_alloc on failure, never returns null) or standard-conforming allocators (which must throw rather than return null per C++ standard). No code path reaches a pi_->method() call without a preceding null guard.
